Resolutions less than 1278px are not supported

FoodBase PRO+ v0.98+

  • Menu editor
  • Database
  • Settings
  • About
USED HOT KEYS
  • F1 ■ Menu editor / tempates [global]
  • F2 ■ Dish database [global]
  • F3 ■ Settings [global]
  • F4 ■ Add dish [база блюд]
  • F6 ■ Print menu [menu editor]
  • F7 ■ Add dish from the database [menu editor]
  • F8 ■ Broadcast to customer screens [menu editor]
  • F9 ■ Save date into active template [menu editor]
  • [1], [2], [3] ... [+] ■ Выбор активного шаблона [menu editor]
  • CTRL + Z ■ Clear active template [menu editor]
  • CTRL + 0 ■ System information [about]
  • F11 ■ Help & manuals [about]
  • CTRL + L ■ Dark / light theme toggler [global]
  •   ,     ■ Customer screen #1 [menu editor]
  •   .     ■ Customer screen #2 [menu editor]

MENU EDITOR   ► ABOUT

    ► Key features
  • Formation of different menu-templates: lunch (5 templates), breakfast (3 templates), cafeteria (5 templates)
  • A wide range of tools for working with menu templates: filling, editing the date and price of a dish, printing and clearing the template
  • Adding/removing dishes from the database, editing dish properties such as: internal code, name, composition, weight distribution, dish category, manufacturer's workshop
  • Search for dishes in the database by dish code, name, category, and manufacturer
  • Formation and display of the menu on the customer's screens [currently in progress]
  • Advanced settings aimed at efficient administration of the operator prompt program
  • Convenient import of XLSX files into the database
  • Hotkey support for efficient work
  • New Year decorations appearing during New Year days: administrator interface (December 29, 30, 31, January 1st) and on the customer screens (December, January, February)
  • An extensive section with technical assistance for the end user

You can call hotkeys cheat sheet menu from any page of the program, just press [CTRL] + [H]

MAIN SECTIONS OF THE PROGRAM

The main windows of the program and their descriptions. When you hover over the image, an information window appears, giving a brief description and a hotkey.

The Menu Editor is divided into several sections. The main section displays lists of dishes organized by category. Initially, it will be empty and needs to be populated with dishes by adding new ones. Adding new dishes is done by clicking the [Add dish from database] button or by pressing [F7].
A search bar is located below the main menu. You can search for dishes by code, dish name, dish type, and manufacturer. To clear the bar, press [ESC]. The red bar below the search bar displays the total number of dishes in the database. The "Code" column allows you to sort dishes from smallest to largest and vice versa. At the bottom of the screen, there is an [Add Dish] button, hotkey [F4]. When you expand the add dish panel, the blue [Add Dish] button changes to [Close].
This section is designed for fine-tuning software settings and advanced database administration (deleting temporary files, completely clearing the database, importing a list of dishes from an external XLS file). You can view hotkeys in the green information panel on the right. Information tooltips and visual effects can also be controlled here. Control is provided via switches, buttons, and links. ATTENTION: Technical information for the administrator. For importing from an XLS file to work correctly, the file must be named 2base.xlsx and located in a specific path (specified in the "Settings" section).
You are currently on this page, here you can find details on operation, technical support contacts and much more

INTERFACE ELEMENTS

Interacting with finer details of the interface and becoming more involved in the program

At the top, you can see the main menu, which allows you to navigate the program. Current date, Program name and version, Menu editor [ F1 ] / Dish database [ F2 ] / Settings [ F3 ] / About the program [ F11 ] / Light/dark theme switch [ CTRL ] + [ L ] / Page refresh [ F5 ]
In the "Menu Editor" you can add a dish in the active template, delete a dish, assign a price to a dish, and also clear a dish
The bottom toolbar contains buttons that perform various operations with menu templates. [ Broadcast ] > broadcasts active template to the customer screens [ F8 ]. Two-way screen broadcast. [ Print template ] > prints active template [ F8 ]. [ Add dishes from database ] > add dishes from the database to the active template [ F7 ]. [ Date select ] > Select desired date for the active template [ Save ] > Save the date to the active template [ F9 ]
When you click the [Add dish from the database] button in the bottom panel of the "Menu Editor" page, a modal window opens where you can select the required dishes.
The left-hand sidebar displays templates for lunch, breakfast, and cafeteria. The active template is circled in red and highlighted. Below the menu templates are three links. The Dish Database duplicates the main menu Dish Database link. There are also two links to customer screens for previews. At the very bottom is a calendar bar with the current date.
Here you can enter the following data: dish code, dish name, dish ingredients, quantity, dish type, and manufacturer. Clicking the green [Add to Database] button will add the dish to the database, but only if the dish code doesnt match one already in the database. If this happens, the program will display a warning and clear all fields for future entry of new data. The red [Clear Fields] button will reset all fields to their default state.
In this modal window, you can edit all the main characteristics of a dish, including the price, name, ingredients, weight, type of dish, or the production location. A green checkmark accepts the changes and saves them to the database. An orange cross cancels the changes and returns to the list of dishes in the database. Pressing [ESC] is equivalent to clicking the orange cross. Clicking the red trash bin deletes the selected dish. Be careful when clicking the delete button!
This is a preview of the document when printing the active template from the Menu Editor, it displays all the added dishes, and also indicates the signatories responsible for this document
To make the hotkey panel visible on the "Settings" and "About" pages, you need to activate it in the "Settings" section using the "Enable right-hand hint" toggle switch.

BREAKDOWN OF THE MOST FREQUENT QUESTIONS

Answers to the most frequently asked questions will be posted here

How do i get the answer ?

Simply click on the question you are interested in, the block will expand, displaying the previously hidden answer with a detailed explanation.

Why don't hotkeys work?

Make sure your keyboard layout is set to English. You can switch between these layouts by pressing [CTRL] + [SHIFT] or [ALT] + [SHIFT], depending on your computer's configuration.

Something went wrong and the program is not working correctly, what should I do?

Please restart your computer and try again.

TECHNICAL INFORMATION


Software breakdown

No frameworks were harmed during development..

  • Windows 7 x64 ESU
  • Apache 2.4.58 [XAMPP]
  • PHP v8.2.12
  • PostgreSQL v14/v17
  • Node.JS v23.7
  • Webpack v5.98
  • Codium v1.102
  • Nodepad++ v8.9
  • FireFox v153
  • Supermium v144
